topics.name: Speech Separation and Target Speaker Extraction

papers.title: Generative Pre-training for Speech with Flow Matching
papers.summary: Generative models have gained more and more attention in recent years for their remarkable success in tasks that required estimating and sampling data distribution to generate high-fidelity synthetic data. In speech, text-to-speech synthesis and neural vocoder are good examples where generative models have shined. While generative models have been applied to different applications in speech, there exists no general-purpose generative model that models speech directly. In this work, we take a step toward this direction by showing a single pre-trained generative model can be adapted to different downstream tasks with strong performance. Specifically, we pre-trained a generative model, named SpeechFlow, on 60k hours of untranscribed speech with Flow Matching and masked conditions. Experiment results show the pre-trained generative model can be fine-tuned with task-specific data to match or surpass existing expert models on speech enhancement, separation, and synthesis. Our work suggested a foundational model for generation tasks in speech can be built with generative pre-training.
papers.justification: 论文提出SpeechFlow，采用Flow Matching预训练语音生成模型，可微调用于语音增强、分离和合成，与生成式语音技术方向高度相关，方法新颖且具基础性，是必读级别工作。

chinese_summary.problem: 当前语音生成模型多为任务专用，缺乏统一预训练的基础生成模型，难以通用和共享知识。
chinese_summary.method: 提出SpeechFlow，在60k小时未转录语音上使用Flow Matching和masked条件进行生成预训练；下游任务通过微调适配，覆盖语音增强、分离和合成。
chinese_summary.innovation: 首次证明单一预训练生成模型可适应多个语音下游任务（增强、分离、合成）且性能优异；引入Flow Matching实现大规模无监督语音生成预训练，填补通用语音生成基础模型的空白。
chinese_summary.evidence: 摘要声称在语音增强、分离和合成任务上微调后匹配或超越现有专家模型，但未提供具体量化指标或比较细节，证据强度有限。
chinese_summary.limitations: 未披露实验设置、数据集细节、与baseline的精确对比，masked condition的具体设计需全文确认；泛化到未见任务（如语音修复、带宽扩展）的潜力存疑。
chinese_summary.why_relevant: 论文直接采用Flow Matching进行语音生成预训练，并示范在语音增强、分离和合成上的应用，完美匹配我的研究方向中'generative speech enhancement'、'speech synthesis'、'flow matching speech'等关键词，且'generative pre-training'思路对构建通用生成模型极具参考价值。

papers.title: SpatialNet: Extensively Learning Spatial Information for Multichannel Joint Speech Separation, Denoising and Dereverberation
papers.summary: This work proposes a neural network to extensively exploit spatial information for multichannel joint speech separation, denoising and dereverberation, named SpatialNet. In the short-time Fourier transform (STFT) domain, the proposed network performs end-to-end speech enhancement. It is mainly composed of interleaved narrow-band and cross-band blocks to respectively exploit narrow-band and cross-band spatial information. The narrow-band blocks process frequencies independently, and use self-attention mechanism and temporal convolutional layers to respectively perform spatial-feature-based speaker clustering and temporal smoothing/filtering. The cross-band blocks process frames independently, and use full-band linear layer and frequency convolutional layers to respectively learn the correlation between all frequencies and adjacent frequencies. Experiments are conducted on various simulated and real datasets, and the results show that 1) the proposed network achieves the state-of-the-art performance on almost all tasks; 2) the proposed network suffers little from the spectral generalization problem; and 3) the proposed network is indeed performing speaker clustering (demonstrated by attention maps).
categories: IEEE/ACM Transactions on Audio Speech and Language Processing
papers.venue: IEEE/ACM Transactions on Audio Speech and Language Processing
papers.topic_name: Speech Separation and Target Speaker Extraction
papers.justification: 该论文提出SpatialNet，有效利用空间信息进行多通道语音分离、去噪和去混响，与研究方向高度相关，方法新颖且具有影响力，符合经典赛道必读级。研究方向涉及Speech Separation和Microphone Array。

chinese_summary.problem: 解决多通道场景下语音分离、去噪和去混响的联合处理问题，充分利用空间信息提升性能。
chinese_summary.method: 提出SpatialNet，在STFT域进行端到端增强，由交错的窄带和跨波段模块组成：窄带模块独立处理每个频率，使用自注意力机制进行空间特征驱动的说话者聚类，时间卷积层进行时域平滑/滤波；跨波段模块独立处理每个时间帧，使用全频带线性层学习所有频率间的相关性，频率卷积层学习相邻频率的相关性。
chinese_summary.innovation: 1) 将空间信息在窄带和跨波段两个维度上分别建模，窄带模块实现基于空间特征的聚类，跨波段模块学习频率间依赖；2) 自注意力机制显式用于说话者聚类并通过注意力图可视化验证；3) 在多种模拟和真实数据集上实现近乎所有任务的当前最佳性能，且显著缓解了频谱泛化问题。
chinese_summary.evidence: 在多种模拟和真实数据集上的实验表明：1) 几乎所有任务达到SOTA；2) 频谱泛化问题小；3) 通过注意力图证明网络确实执行了说话者聚类。
chinese_summary.limitations: 摘要未提及计算复杂度、实际部署实时性、对极低信噪比或强混响场景的鲁棒性，且未明确说明训练数据配置（如麦克风数量、阵列几何等）。
chinese_summary.why_relevant: 论文聚焦语音分离与目标说话人提取的核心问题（语音分离），提出基于空间信息的多通道端到端方法，直接匹配研究方向中的source separation、speech separation、masking model及time-frequency分离方法，且自注意力聚类机制与speaker extraction场景高度相关。

papers.title: URGENT Challenge: Universality, Robustness, and Generalizability For Speech Enhancement
papers.summary: The last decade has witnessed significant advancements in deep learning-based speech enhancement (SE). However, most existing SE research has limitations on the coverage of SE sub-tasks, data diversity and amount, and evaluation metrics. To fill this gap and promote research toward universal SE, we establish a new SE challenge, named URGENT, to focus on the universality, robustness, and generalizability of SE. We aim to extend the SE definition to cover different sub-tasks to explore the limits of SE models, starting from denoising, dereverberation, bandwidth extension, and declipping. A novel framework is proposed to unify all these sub-tasks in a single model, allowing the use of all existing SE approaches. We collected public speech and noise data from different domains to construct diverse evaluation data. Finally, we discuss the insights gained from our preliminary baseline experiments based on both generative and discriminative SE methods with 12 curated metrics.
papers.justification: 该论文提出了URGENT挑战，统一去噪、去混响、带宽扩展和去削波等多个子任务，框架具有基础性和影响力，与语音增强和音频前端方向高度相关，且引用数较高，是必读级别的工作。

chinese_summary.problem: 现有语音增强研究覆盖的子任务有限，数据多样性和评估指标不足，缺乏统一的基准来评估模型的通用性、鲁棒性和泛化性。
chinese_summary.method: 提出URGENT挑战，构建一个统一框架将去噪、去混响、带宽扩展和削波恢复等子任务整合到单个模型中，并收集多样化公开数据构建评估集，基于生成式和判别式SE方法进行基线实验。
chinese_summary.innovation: 首次将多个SE子任务（去噪、去混响、带宽扩展、削波恢复）统一到一个挑战框架中，并构建了跨域多样化评估数据；通过12个精选指标全面评估模型性能，促进通用SE研究。
chinese_summary.evidence: 摘要中提及了初步基线实验，采用生成式和判别式方法以及12个指标，但未给出具体数值结果，证据为初步框架和实验设计。
chinese_summary.limitations: 挑战赛介绍性质，核心方法细节需阅读全文；基线性能未公开，无法评估方法实际效果；是否涵盖声学回声消除等子任务尚不明确。
chinese_summary.why_relevant: 直接涉及语音增强核心子任务（去噪、去混响等），与研究方向的关键词高度匹配（speech enhancement, dereverberation），场景为通用SE模型评估，但论文侧重基准挑战而非新算法，需人工复核具体方法是否与前端处理相关。

papers.title: Sixty Years of Frequency-Domain Monaural Speech Enhancement: From Traditional to Deep Learning Methods
papers.summary: Frequency-domain monaural speech enhancement has been extensively studied for over 60 years, and a great number of methods have been proposed and applied to many devices. In the last decade, monaural speech enhancement has made tremendous progress with the advent and development of deep learning, and performance using such methods has been greatly improved relative to traditional methods. This survey paper first provides a comprehensive overview of traditional and deep-learning methods for monaural speech enhancement in the frequency domain. The fundamental assumptions of each approach are then summarized and analyzed to clarify their limitations and advantages. A comprehensive evaluation of some typical methods was conducted using the WSJ + Deep Noise Suppression (DNS) challenge and Voice Bank + DEMAND datasets to give an intuitive and unified comparison. The benefits of monaural speech enhancement methods using objective metrics relevant for normal-hearing and hearing-impaired listeners were evaluated. The objective test results showed that compression of the input features was important for simulated normal-hearing listeners but not for simulated hearing-impaired listeners. Potential future research and development topics in monaural speech enhancement are suggested.
papers.justification: 该综述系统梳理了频域单通道语音增强60年发展，涵盖传统与深度学习方法，与语音增强方向高度相关，具有重要参考价值和影响力，是必读级基础文献。

chinese_summary.problem: 系统综述60年来频域单通道语音增强的发展，包括传统方法和深度学习方法，总结各自假设、优缺点，并提供统一性能评估及未来方向。
chinese_summary.method: 这是一篇综述论文，通过系统性文献回顾，整理和分析传统方法（如谱减法、维纳滤波）与深度学习方法（如DNN、CNN、RNN）在频域单通道语音增强中的技术与假设；并在WSJ+DNS和Voice Bank+DEMAND数据集上对典型方法进行客观评测，使用针对正常听力和听障听者的指标。
chinese_summary.innovation: 提供全面且结构化的历史回顾，首次深入分析各方法的基本假设以揭示局限性和优势；在统一数据集上对比多种方法，并特别考察听障听者的客观指标，揭示输入特征压缩对不同听者群体的影响差异。
chinese_summary.evidence: 摘要明确使用WSJ+Deep Noise Suppression (DNS) challenge和Voice Bank+DEMAND数据集进行了典型方法的客观评测，指标针对正常和听障听者，并得出特征压缩对正常听者重要但对听障听者不重要的结论。
chinese_summary.limitations: 作为综述，未提出新算法；评估仅基于特定数据集和客观指标，缺乏主观听力实验验证；分类为Trends in Hearing，可能侧重听觉感知而非纯工程实现。
chinese_summary.why_relevant: 论文主题（频域单通道语音增强）完全匹配研究方向中的speech enhancement、denoising、noise reduction等关键词；综述内容涵盖传统与深度学习，与音频前端处理中的neural masking、U-Net等方法直接相关；评估考虑听障听者，与音频前端在助听设备中的应用场景一致。

papers.title: Separate Anything You Describe
papers.summary: Language-queried audio source separation (LASS) is a new paradigm for computational auditory scene analysis (CASA). LASS aims to separate a target sound from an audio mixture given a natural language query, which provides a natural and scalable interface for digital audio applications. Recent works on LASS, despite attaining promising separation performance on specific sources (e.g., musical instruments, limited classes of audio events), are unable to separate audio concepts in the open domain. In this work, we introduce AudioSep, a foundation model for open-domain audio source separation with natural language queries. We train AudioSep on large-scale multimodal datasets and extensively evaluate its capabilities on numerous tasks including audio event separation, musical instrument separation, and speech enhancement. AudioSep demonstrates strong separation performance and impressive zero-shot generalization ability using audio captions or text labels as queries, substantially outperforming previous audio-queried and language-queried sound separation models. Specifically, AudioSep achieved strong results including a signal-to-distortion ratio improvement (SDRi) of 7.74 dB across 527 sound classes of the AudioSet; 9.14 dB on the VGGSound dataset; 8.22 dB on the AudioCaps dataset; 6.85 dB on the Clotho dataset; 10.51 dB on the MUSIC dataset; 10.04 dB on the ESC-50 dataset; 8.16 dB on the DCASE 2024 Task 9 dataset; and a segmental signal to noise ratio (SSNR) of 9.21 dB on the Voicebank-Demand dataset.
categories: IEEE Transactions on Audio, Speech, and Language Processing
papers.venue: IEEE Transactions on Audio, Speech, and Language Processing
papers.topic_name: Speech Separation and Target Speaker Extraction
papers.justification: 与语音分离和目标说话人提取方向高度相关，提出了语言查询的开放域音频源分离基础模型AudioSep，性能优异且具备零样本泛化能力，是领域内的重要基线工作。

chinese_summary.problem: 现有语言查询音频源分离方法仅能处理特定类别（如乐器、有限音频事件），无法在开放域中分离任意音频概念。
chinese_summary.method: 提出AudioSep基础模型，使用大规模多模态数据集训练，以自然语言查询作为输入，采用端到端架构实现开放域音频源分离。模型通过文本标签或音频描述作为查询，直接输出目标音频源。
chinese_summary.innovation: 1) 首次实现开放域音频源分离，支持任意自然语言查询；2) 在大规模多模态数据上训练，展现强大的零样本泛化能力；3) 在多个数据集上显著优于此前音频查询和语言查询的分离模型。
chinese_summary.evidence: 在AudioSet（527类）上SDRi 7.74 dB，VGGSound 9.14 dB，AudioCaps 8.22 dB，Clotho 6.85 dB，MUSIC 10.51 dB，ESC-50 10.04 dB，DCASE 2024 Task 9 8.16 dB，以及语音增强任务Voicebank-Demand上SSNR 9.21 dB。
chinese_summary.limitations: 论文主要聚焦于通用音频事件分离，语音增强仅为其中一项任务，未专门针对语音分离或目标说话人提取进行优化；可能对多说话人混合场景的分离效果未知。
chinese_summary.why_relevant: 论文涉及源分离任务，包含语音增强任务，与研究方向中的'语音分离'和'源分离'关键词部分匹配，但核心是开放域音频事件分离而非专门的目标说话人提取。

papers.title: DELTA-TTS: Adapting Autoregressive Model into Diffusion Language Model for Text-to-Speech
papers.summary: Autoregressive (AR) text-to-speech (TTS) models generate discrete speech tokens sequentially, which makes inference slow and can degrade robustness by propagating local errors and hallucinations. This limitation stems from their left-to-right AR commitment: each token must be determined before future speech-token context is available. However, such ordering is not an inherent requirement for TTS, as the full input text is available before synthesis. In this paper, we introduce DELTA-TTS, a lightweight LoRA-based adaptation framework that converts a pretrained AR TTS model into a discrete diffusion language model (dLLM) for confidence-ordered speech-token decoding. To better capture the local structure of speech, DELTA-TTS incorporates a convolution module that injects local acoustic context, together with a $1/t$-weighted training objective and a time-shifted inference schedule that defer low-confidence positions to later steps. Trained on only $585$ hours of LibriTTS, DELTA-TTS achieves a $\textbf{1.75}\%$ WER on Seed-TTS test-en, outperforming its AR backbone while generating tokens $\textbf{3.3}\times$ faster. Further analysis shows that DELTA-TTS produces sharper text--speech alignment, increases overall decoding confidence, and mitigates hallucinations observed in AR generation.
papers.justification: 该论文直接针对语音合成（TTS）任务，提出将自回归模型转换为扩散语言模型，与研究方向中的Generative Speech Technology高度相关；方法新颖（LoRA适配、卷积模块、1/t加权训练），实验结果表明在质量和速度上均有提升，是必读级别的工作。

chinese_summary.problem: 现有自回归（AR）文本到语音（TTS）模型逐序列生成离散语音token，导致推理速度慢，且因局部误差传播和幻觉问题而鲁棒性下降。
chinese_summary.method: 提出DELTA-TTS框架，通过轻量级LoRA适配将预训练的AR TTS模型转换为离散扩散语言模型（dLLM），实现基于置信度排序的语音token解码。集成卷积模块以捕获局部声学上下文，采用1/t加权训练目标和时移推理调度，将低置信度位置推迟到后续步骤处理。
chinese_summary.innovation: 1. 首次将AR TTS模型转化为扩散语言模型，突破自左向右的生成顺序约束，允许按置信度解码。2. 利用LoRA实现高效适配，仅需微调少量参数即可转换预训练模型。3. 设计结合卷积模块、加权训练目标和时移推理的机制，提升解码置信度和对齐质量，减少幻觉。
chinese_summary.evidence: 在LibriTTS 585小时数据上训练，Seed-TTS test-en测试集词错误率1.75%，优于AR骨干模型；推理速度提升3.3倍。进一步分析显示对齐更尖锐、解码置信度更高、幻觉减少。
chinese_summary.limitations: 依赖预训练AR模型的质量和结构；训练数据量相对较小（585小时），可能限制泛化性；扩散模型推理步数未明确讨论，可能与速度-质量权衡有关。
chinese_summary.why_relevant: 直接对应研究方向中的Text-to-Speech（TTS）和扩散模型在语音中的应用（diffusion model speech），方法创新且性能提升显著，可借鉴其模型适配思路用于其他生成式语音任务。

papers.title: Twenty-Five Years of Sensor Array and Multichannel Signal Processing: A review of progress to date and potential research directions
papers.summary: In this article, a general introduction to the area of sensor array and multichannel signal processing is provided, including associated activities of the IEEE Signal Processing Society (SPS) Sensor Array and Multichannel (SAM) Technical Committee (TC). The main technological advances in five SAM subareas made in the past 25 years are then presented in detail, including beamforming, direction-of-arrival (DOA) estimation, sensor location optimization, target/source localization based on sensor arrays, and multiple-input multiple-output (MIMO) arrays. Six recent developments are also provided at the end to indicate possible promising directions for future SAM research, which are graph signal processing (GSP) for sensor networks; tensor-based array signal processing, quaternion-valued array signal processing, 1-bit and noncoherent sensor array signal processing, machine learning and artificial intelligence (AI) for sensor arrays; and array signal processing for next-generation communication systems.
papers.justification: 全面回顾传感器阵列和波束形成领域25年进展，与麦克风阵列和波束形成方向高度相关，基础性强、影响力高，是必读综述。

chinese_summary.problem: 缺乏对传感器阵列和多通道信号处理领域过去25年主要技术进展和未来研究方向的系统综述，特别是波束形成、DOA估计、传感器位置优化、目标定位和MIMO阵列等子领域的总结。
chinese_summary.method: 采用综述方法，首先概述传感器阵列和多通道信号处理领域的基本概念及IEEE SPS SAM技术委员会的相关活动，然后详细回顾五个子领域（波束形成、DOA估计、传感器位置优化、基于传感器阵列的目标源定位、MIMO阵列）在过去25年的主要技术进展，最后提出六个未来研究方向（图信号处理、张量阵列处理、四元数阵列处理、1比特非相干阵列处理、机器学习/AI、下一代通信系统阵列处理）。
chinese_summary.innovation: 1. 提供首个涵盖过去25年SAM五个核心子领域进展的综合综述；2. 系统性地将六个新兴方向 (GSP、张量、四元数、1比特、AI、通信) 作为未来研究展望；3. 基于IEEE SPS SAM技术委员会的视角，确保内容权威性和时效性。
chinese_summary.evidence: 摘要中没有提供具体实验数据或系统证据，仅描述综述结构和历史回顾，属于综述性文章，证据来自文献总结。
chinese_summary.limitations: 1. 综述性质，缺乏实验对比或性能定量分析；2. 对每个子领域的介绍可能较为概括，深度有限；3. 未来方向的探讨偏重趋势，缺少具体算法设计。
chinese_summary.why_relevant: 直接覆盖用户研究方向中的核心内容：beamforming、DOA estimation、array signal processing、spatial filtering、MIMO array等关键词，且综述性质有助于了解领域全貌和前沿方向，特别适合概念梳理和研究方向选择。

papers.title: Structured Nyquist Correlation Reconstruction for DOA Estimation With Sparse Arrays
papers.summary: Sparse arrays are known to achieve an increased number of degrees-of-freedom (DOFs) for direction-of-arrival (DOA) estimation, where an augmented virtual uniform array calculated from the correlations of sub-Nyquist spatial samples is processed to retrieve the angles unambiguously. Nevertheless, the geometry of the derived virtual array is dominated by the specific physical array configurations, as well as the deviation caused by the practical unforeseen circumstances such as detection malfunction and missing data, resulting in a quite sensitive model for virtual array signal processing. In this paper, we propose a novel sparse array DOA estimation algorithm via structured correlation reconstruction, where the Nyquist spatial filling is implemented on the physical array with a compressed transformation related to its equivalent filled array to guarantee the general applicability. While the unknown correlations located in the whole rows and columns of the augmented covariance matrix lead to the fact that strong incoherence property is no longer satisfied for matrix completion, the structural information is introduced as a priori to formulate the structured correlation reconstruction problem for matrix reconstruction. As such, the reconstructed covariance matrix can be effectively processed with full utilization of the achievable DOFs from the virtual array, but with a more flexible constraint on the array configuration. The described estimation problem is theoretically analyzed by deriving the corresponding Cramér-Rao bound (CRB). Moreover, we compare the derived CRB with the performance of the virtual array interpolation-based algorithm. Simulation results demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed algorithm in terms of DOFs, resolution, and estimation accuracy.
papers.justification: 该论文针对稀疏阵列DOA估计提出结构化相关重构算法，与麦克风阵列及DOA估计方向高度相关，方法新颖且理论推导完整，属于经典赛道必读水平。

chinese_summary.problem: 解决稀疏阵列在DOA估计中因物理阵列配置和实际因素（如检测故障、缺失数据）导致虚拟协方差矩阵重构敏感、自由度利用不充分的问题。
chinese_summary.method: 提出结构化奈奎斯特相关重构算法：首先对物理阵列进行压缩变换实现奈奎斯特空间填充，然后利用协方差矩阵中整行整列未知相关的结构化先验信息，将矩阵重构问题建模为结构化相关重构，从而有效重建协方差矩阵，充分利用虚拟阵列自由度。
chinese_summary.innovation: 1. 通过压缩变换实现物理阵列的奈奎斯特空间填充，使算法对不同阵列配置具有通用性；2. 利用结构化先验信息（整行整列未知相关）解决矩阵补全中强非相干性不满足的问题，实现鲁棒的重建；3. 理论上推导了克拉美-罗界（CRB），并与虚拟阵列插值算法对比，验证了在自由度、分辨率和估计精度上的优势。
chinese_summary.evidence: 摘要中给出了理论推导的CRB，并通过与虚拟阵列插值算法的仿真比较，证明了所提算法在DOFs、分辨率和估计精度方面的有效性。
chinese_summary.limitations: 未讨论实际麦克风阵列中非理想因素（如噪声相关性、阵元互耦）的影响；仿真设置可能与实际麦克风阵列场景存在差距，需阅读全文确认具体实现细节和计算复杂度。
chinese_summary.why_relevant: 论文直接研究稀疏阵列的DOA估计，与我的研究方向“麦克风阵列与波束形成”中的“声源定位”和“到达方向估计”高度吻合。文中使用的稀疏阵列、虚拟均匀阵列、协方差矩阵重构等技术直接适用于麦克风阵列场景，尤其对提升低阵列数情况下的DOA分辨能力有重要参考价值。

papers.title: Weakly Guided and Autoregressive Beamformer Parameterization for Generalizable Moving Speaker Extraction in Higher-Order Ambisonics
papers.summary: Linear spatial filters (beamformers) enable robust, generalizable and interpretable speech enhancement with performance guarantees under ideal parameterization. Modern beamformers are often parameterized by deep neural networks, whose performance degrades in dynamic scenarios with multiple moving speakers of unknown directions. We propose a data-driven beamforming pipeline, which only requires an estimate of the target's initial direction. Building on a higher-order ambisonics representation, we show that neural temporal-spectral processing can be decoupled from linear spatial processing, and thereby achieve generalizable and array-agnostic enhancement. By incorporating autoregression into a frame-wise causal framework, we maintain consistent performance throughout fast speaker motion and long recordings. Evaluation on synthetic data demonstrates robust enhancement under challenging conditions with closely spaced and crossing speakers. Real-world recordings in a dynamic office meeting scenario complement these findings and show generalizability across varying ambisonics orders.
papers.justification: 论文聚焦移动说话人提取中的波束形成问题，方法与我的麦克风阵列和波束形成方向高度相关，提出新颖的自回归参数化框架，实验充分，泛化性强。

chinese_summary.problem: 现有基于深度神经网络的波束形成器在多个未知方向移动说话人的动态场景下性能下降，需要一种鲁棒、可泛化且阵列无关的移动说话人提取方法。
chinese_summary.method: 提出一种数据驱动的波束形成流水线，仅需目标初始方向估计；基于高阶Ambisonics表示解耦神经时频处理与线性空间处理，并通过自回归帧级因果框架保持快速运动下的性能一致性，实现阵列无关的语音增强。
chinese_summary.innovation: 创新点包括：1）弱引导策略仅需初始方向，降低先验需求；2）自回归因果框架在帧级处理中保持对快速移动和长序列的稳定性能；3）基于高阶Ambisonics的解耦设计使方法可泛化至不同阵列配置和Ambisonics阶数。
chinese_summary.evidence: 合成数据实验在紧密间隔和交叉说话人挑战条件下显示鲁棒增强；真实动态办公室会议场景中验证了跨不同Ambisonics阶数的泛化性。
chinese_summary.limitations: 摘要未提及噪声类型及信噪比范围、未与现有移动说话人提取方法（如时域方法）定量对比、未讨论初始方向估计误差的影响。
chinese_summary.why_relevant: 论文核心为波束形成（beamforming）和空间滤波（spatial filtering）在移动多说话人场景下的多通道语音增强（multichannel speech enhancement），直接命中研究方向关键词beamforming、array signal processing、spatial filtering、MVDR beamforming、sound source localization（通过初始方向估计），且使用高阶Ambisonics表示与空间特征相关。

papers.title: Ranking the Impact of Contextual Specialization in Neural Speech Enhancement
papers.summary: We systematically investigate neural speech enhancement systems, ranging from very small ($\sim$10\,k parameters) to medium-large ($\sim$2-5\,M parameters), which specialize to acoustic conditions using contextual information such as speaker identity, noise type, speaker gender, spoken language, and SNR. By fine-tuning generalist models on specific data subsets, we find that specializing to a speaker's identity consistently yields the largest gains in estimated speech intelligibility and quality. In contrast, specializing to SNR, noise type, or gender offers only marginal benefits. Crucially, we show that a small model specialized to both a specific speaker and a specific noise type can match or exceed the performance of a generalist model ten times its size. Further, cross-lingual tests reveal that models specialized to a target language outperform multilingual generalists, suggesting that language is a salient feature for specialization. These findings highlight the potential of small, adaptive models for resource-constrained applications like hearing aids, which specialize on-the-fly to contextual information.
papers.justification: 该论文系统评估了不同上下文信息对语音增强系统性能的影响，发现说话人身份特化效果最显著，与Speech Enhancement and Audio Frontend方向高度相关，实验扎实，具有应用价值。

chinese_summary.problem: 在资源受限的语音增强系统中（如助听器），确定哪些上下文信息（说话人身份、噪声类型、性别、语言、SNR）的专门化能带来最大的性能提升，以指导小模型自适应。
chinese_summary.method: 通过微调通用语音增强模型（基于特定数据子集），系统比较不同上下文专门化（说话人身份、噪声类型、性别、语言、SNR）对估计的语音可懂度和质量的影响；包含从极小（约10k参数）到中大型（2-5M参数）模型的对比实验。
chinese_summary.innovation: 1) 首次系统评估多种上下文专门化对神经语音增强的相对贡献，并量化其影响排名；2) 发现说话人身份专门化始终带来最大增益，而SNR、噪声类型或性别专门化收益甚微；3) 证明专用于特定说话人和噪声类型的模型（即使参数少十倍）可匹配或超越通用模型；4) 揭示语言专门化优于多语言通用模型。
chinese_summary.evidence: 摘要中明确报告：说话人身份专门化在语音可懂度和质量上增益最大；小模型（专门化）可匹敌十倍参数通用模型；跨语言测试显示目标语言专门化优于多语言通用模型。但未提供具体数值或统计显著性，需阅读全文确认。
chinese_summary.limitations: 1) 模型结构仅限特定神经语音增强系统，未涵盖所有架构（如U-Net变体）；2) 实验基于有限数据集和上下文组合，泛化性需验证；3) 未涉及实际实时自适应系统实现细节。
chinese_summary.why_relevant: 论文直接研究语音增强系统性能，与研究方向中的speech enhancement核心主题一致；专门化策略与资源受限场景（如助听器）匹配，关键词如speech enhancement、noise suppression、speech frontend均命中。
